positive: A breathtaking, stylized depiction of cosmic dust and stellar formations forming a symmetrical, flowing nebula pattern. The design features glowing, intricate constellations rendered in brilliant sapphire blue, deep violet, and emerald green. The central focus is a large, abstract celestial body composed of swirling, energetic lines and dots. Composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, ideal for a chest print on an apparel garment. Use a vector art aesthetic mixed with ethereal watercolor gradient blending. Lighting should be dramatic, with strong contrast between the glowing foreground elements and the deep, midnight background void. Highly detailed, clean silhouette style, maximalist celestial composition, science fantasy concept art, perfect for screen printing.
negative: lowres, artifacts, blur, text, logo, watermark, signature, grainy, noise, poor quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, messy lines, realism, solid block color
